---
title: "Map Gallery"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
editor: source
---

This gallery showcases cartographic layouts and spatial visualizations developed during my studies in geomatics and GIS.

## Map Gallery

<div class="project-grid">

<a href="images/harmonized_maps.png" class="project-card-link">
  <div class="project-card">
    <img src="images/harmonized_maps.png" alt="Harmonized land-cover maps" class="project-card-img">
    <div class="project-card-body">
      <h3>Harmonized Land-Cover Maps</h3>
      <p>Comparison of harmonized land-cover datasets used to analyze agricultural transitions.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</a>

<a href="images/change_map2.png" class="project-card-link">
  <div class="project-card">
    <img src="images/change_map2.png" alt="Change detection map" class="project-card-img">
    <div class="project-card-body">
      <h3>Change Detection Map</h3>
      <p>Spatial representation of land-cover change across the study area.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</a>

<a href="images/adjacency.png" class="project-card-link">
  <div class="project-card">
    <img src="images/adjacency.png" alt="Adjacency analysis map" class="project-card-img">
    <div class="project-card-body">
      <h3>Adjacency Analysis</h3>
      <p>Visualization of agricultural adjacency and interspersion patterns.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</a>

<a href="images/sankey_2015_2020.png" class="project-card-link">
  <div class="project-card">
    <img src="images/sankey_2015_2020.png" alt="Land-cover transition Sankey diagram" class="project-card-img">
    <div class="project-card-body">
      <h3>Land-Cover Transition Sankey</h3>
      <p>Diagram illustrating transitions between land-cover classes from 2015 to 2020.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</a>

<a href="images/normalized_weights.png" class="project-card-link">
  <div class="project-card">
    <img src="images/normalized_weights.png" alt="Dataset weighting visualization" class="project-card-img">
    <div class="project-card-body">
      <h3>Normalized Dataset Weights</h3>
      <p>Visualization of dataset weighting used during land-cover harmonization.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</a>

<a href="images/forest-agric.png" class="project-card-link">
  <div class="project-card">
    <img src="images/forest-agric.png" alt="Forest agriculture spatial patterns map" class="project-card-img">
    <div class="project-card-body">
      <h3>Forest–Agriculture Spatial Patterns</h3>
      <p>Map showing spatial relationships between forest cover and agricultural land uses.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</a>

</div>
